title: SEC3: MessageRevision.body_type still String after Message upgrade
description: MessageRevision.body_type (types.rs:261) remains String while Message.body_type was upgraded to BodyType in this commit. Both fields represent the MIME type of a message body — MessageRevision is the edit-history snapshot of Message. Callers processing edit history must write ad-hoc string matches against the BodyType values while Message itself uses the typed enum. Suggested rewrite: change MessageRevision.body_type from String to BodyType. The field already round-trips through the same JSON string values so serde handles it transparently with no fixture changes needed.
notes: opinion: stylistic preference. This is a duplicate of jmap-chat-tui-7c2.1 (same engineering finding stated differently). The suggested fix is identical. No additional engineering substance beyond what 7c2.1 captures.
